calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Aug-04-2021 Set For Trial On Aug-04-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 504

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-03-2021 Continued To Aug-04-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-04-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Katie McBride, Plaintiff/Respondent
Austin McBride, Plaintiff/Respondent
Steven Jeffrey Mehlman, Esq. for Defendant/Appellant Equity Residential Management, LLC

The cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. The clerk administers the oath to all parties and witnesses.

The parties agree to the consolidation of case no. CSM-21-864054 with case no.CSM-21-864058 for purposes of trial only.

The Plaintiffs/Respondents present opening statement on their own behalf. Mr. Mehlman present opening statements on behalf of defendant/appellant Equity Residential Management, LLC

The Plaintiffs/Respondents present their respective cases by testimony and documentary evidence under oath.

Mr. Mehlman presents evidence and witnesses: Anastasia Keesling, Darian La Foucade & Tiffany Pineda. Witnesses testify under oath.

All Exhibits have been admitted into evidence.

Respondent Austin McBride testifies in rebuttal.
Mr. Darian La Foucade is further examined by Mr. Mehlman.
Respondent Katie McBride presents closing argument. Mr. Mehlman presents closing argument on behalf of Appellant Equity Residential Management, LLC.

The case is submitted for decision.

The Court having considered the evidence presented and testimony of the parties and witnesses, finds in favor of Appellant/Defendant Equity Residential Management, LLC and against Respondent/Plaintiff Austin McBride. Judgment of May 28-2021 is reversed.

Appellant Equity Residential Management, LLC shall reimburse Respondent Austin McBride for December 2020 pro rata rent in the amount of $251.00; December 2020 pro rata parking in the amount of $41.13; December 2020 electricity in the amount of $118.00; and December 2020 utilities in the amount of $174.22 for a total amount of $584.35.

All Exhibits are returned to the submitting parties.

Judge Garrett L. Wong, Clerk C. Banayad, not reported (504)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-28-2021 Judgment Entered
